title: Mood Contract v1
description: Defines a mood contract that shapes atmosphere and pacing over one or more regions or tile classes within a constellation.

id.description: Registry identifier for this mood contract, typically MOOD-CODE-SEQ.

objectKind.description: Discriminator indicating this is a mood contract.

tier.description: Tier for this contract (e.g., standard, mature, vault).

appliesToRegionId.description: ID of the primary region this mood is anchored to.

moodName.description: Human-readable name for this mood contract.

summary.description: Short description of the intended mood and player experience.

tileClassBands.description: Per-tile-class invariant and metric bands that define how the mood behaves in different local structures.

invariantBindings.description: Concrete invariant bindings for this tile class within the mood.

metricTargets.description: Target entertainment metrics for this tile class within the mood.

tags.description: Free-form tags for discovery and routing (e.g., liminal, subterranean).

metadata.description: Optional metadata block for provenance and editorial notes.
